rationale: Both candidates independently verify the delegated-vs-direct loader distinction, confirm qwen2_old's guard removal is safe, and—crucially—both surface the unswept hunyuan_image3_transformer.py caller that the human reviewers missed (satisfying gap_hit). X's version of that finding is softened to 'non-blocking...since addressed on main,' downgrading it to a footnote under an APPROVE verdict, while Y flags it as [major] with grep evidence, exact AttributeError consequence, and a concrete fix, matching the actual severity the later issue #4891 implies. Y also lands a strong, well-evidenced hit on the human reviewer's 'keep the regression test' concern (citing the PR author's stated intent to remove it), which X only weakly echoes. X edges out on one nuance—critiquing that the delegated-loader test doesn't exercise the real AutoWeightsLoader mapping path, closer to lishunyang12's fake-param concern—but overall Y's findings are equally grounded and more actionably framed.
